targetAircraftOrObject: Airbus A320 cockpit prebuilt component candidates
targetVariantStatus: Confirmed production target is Airbus A320 First-Officer cockpit. Candidate source variants must record A320, A320-family, A320neo, simulator, printable/home-cockpit, or unknown status.
sourceIdentity: Free/open-first prebuilt 3D candidates from Sketchfab, FlightGear/GitHub, Printables, and Thingiverse for A320 cockpit shell, chair, FCU/glareshield, side-stick area, pedestal, knobs, and panels.
allowedUsage: Agent 1 source discovery and ranking for downloadable or inspectable prebuilt A320 cockpit parts
license and attribution screening before any local download
format, polygon-count, component-coverage, and import-route planning
candidate comparison against approved Airbus A320 real-aircraft references
forbiddenUsage: downloading, importing, or committing prebuilt assets before manifest/source approval
treating Sketchfab, simulator, home-cockpit, or 3D-print parts as production geometry authority
using paid marketplace assets in this pass
mixing DC-9, Model Y, or unrelated cockpit details into the Airbus scene group
starting Agent 2 assembly before human source approval
variantCompatibility: A320 exact candidates are preferred. A320-family, A320neo, simulator, printable, and home-cockpit parts may be proxy candidates only until inspected against real A320 references.
